94:
SELECT a.account_id,
       (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district) - (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM district) AS salary_gap
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp ON c.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account a ON disp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND d.A11 = (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM district)
  AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date)
                     FROM client
                     WHERE gender = 'F'
                       AND district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A11 = (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM district)));	----- bird -----	financial

944:
WITH race AS (
    SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix' LIMIT 1
), champ AS (
    SELECT milliseconds AS champ_ms 
    FROM results 
    WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM race) AND positionOrder = 1
), last_driver AS (
    SELECT milliseconds AS last_ms 
    FROM results 
    WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM race) 
      AND time IS NOT NULL 
      AND positionOrder = (SELECT MAX(positionOrder) 
                           FROM results 
                           WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM race) AND time IS NOT NULL)
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN last_ms IS NULL OR champ_ms IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE ( (last_ms - champ_ms) * 100.0 / last_ms )
    END AS percentage_faster
FROM champ, last_driver;	----- bird -----	formula_1

    CASE 
        WHEN cnt_inpatient > cnt_outpatient THEN 'inpatient'
        WHEN cnt_inpatient < cnt_outpatient THEN 'outpatient'
        ELSE 'equal'
    END AS larger_group,
    ROUND((cnt_inpatient - cnt_outpatient) * 100.0 / NULLIF(cnt_outpatient,0), 2) AS deviation_percent
FROM (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN SEX='M' AND Admission='+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cnt_inpatient,
        SUM(CASE WHEN SEX='M' AND Admission='-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cnt_outpatient
    FROM Patient
);	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction

1481:
SELECT 
  (sme_avg - lam_avg) AS diff_sme_lam,
  (lam_avg - kam_avg) AS diff_lam_kam,
  (kam_avg - sme_avg) AS diff_kam_sme
FROM (
  WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT ym.CustomerID, ym.Consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
  ),
  cust_total AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM filtered ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    GROUP BY CustomerID, c.Segment
  ),
  seg_totals AS (
    SELECT Segment, SUM(total_consumption) AS seg_total
    FROM cust_total
    GROUP BY Segment
  ),
  min_counts AS (
    SELECT Segment, COUNT(*) AS min_cnt
    FROM cust_total ct
    WHERE ct.total_consumption = (
      SELECT MIN(total_consumption) 
      FROM cust_total ct2 
      WHERE ct2.Segment = ct.Segment
    )
    GROUP BY Segment
  ),
  averages AS (
    SELECT st.Segment, st.seg_total / mc.min_cnt AS avg_metric
    FROM seg_totals st
    JOIN min_counts mc ON st.Segment = mc.Segment
  )
  SELECT 
    (SELECT avg_metric FROM averages WHERE Segment='SME') AS sme_avg,
    (SELECT avg_metric FROM averages WHERE Segment='LAM') AS lam_avg,
    (SELECT avg_metric FROM averages WHERE Segment='KAM') AS kam_avg
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1482:
SELECT Segment, pct_increase, 'biggest' AS rank
FROM (
   SELECT c.Segment,
          ((SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
            SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END))
          / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END),0) * 100.0 AS pct_increase
   FROM yearmonth ym
   JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
   WHERE c.Currency='EUR'
     AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
   GROUP BY c.Segment
   ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
   LIMIT 1
) UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct_increase, 'lowest' AS rank
FROM (
   SELECT c.Segment,
          ((SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) –
            SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END))
          / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END),0) * 100.0 AS pct_increase
   FROM yearmonth ym
   JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
   WHERE c.Currency='EUR'
     AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
   GROUP BY c.Segment
   ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
   LIMIT 1
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

FROM transactions_1k

1520:
SELECT t.Date,
       t.Amount * t.Price AS Expense,
       (SELECT SUM(t2.Amount * t2.Price)
        FROM transactions_1k t2
        WHERE t2.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
          AND strftime('%Y', t2.Date) = '2012'
          AND strftime('%m', t2.Date) = '01') AS Jan2012_Spend
FROM transactions_1k t
WHERE t.CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID
                      FROM transactions_1k
                      WHERE Amount * Price = 124.05)
  AND strftime('%Y', t.Date) = '2012'
  AND strftime('%m', t.Date) = '01';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1521: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transactions_1k t JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-26' AND t.Time BETWEEN '08:00:00' AND '09:00:00' AND g.Country = 'CZE';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1522:
SELECT c.Currency
FROM customers c
JOIN (
    SELECT t.CustomerID, SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) AS total_spent
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON ym.CustomerID = t.CustomerID AND ym.Date LIKE '201306%'
    GROUP BY t.CustomerID
) s ON s.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE s.total_spent = 214582.17;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

1525:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.Currency='EUR' THEN t.CustomerID END) * 100.0) / COUNT(DISTINCT t.CustomerID) AS Percentage
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1526: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '2012%' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '2013%' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '2012%' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END),0) AS consumption_decrease_rate FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM transactions_1k WHERE Amount = 634.8 AND Date='2012-08-25');	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1527:
SELECT GasStationID, SUM(Amount * Price) AS revenue
FROM transactions_1k
GROUP BY GasStationID
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1528:
SELECT
    CASE WHEN total_amount = 0 THEN 0
         ELSE (premium_amount * 100.0 / total_amount)
    END AS premium_percentage
FROM (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.Description = 'premium' THEN t.Amount ELSE 0 END) AS premium_amount,
        SUM(t.Amount) AS total_amount
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
    JOIN products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
    WHERE g.Country = 'SVK'
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

1530:
SELECT p.Description
FROM products p
JOIN transactions_1k t ON p.ProductID = t.ProductID
GROUP BY p.ProductID, p.Description
ORDER BY SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) DESC
LIMIT 5;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1531:
SELECT c.CustomerID,
       c.Currency,
       SUM(t.Price) / SUM(t.Amount) AS avg_price_per_item
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
